text: A rapidly-changing digital world and an increasingly interconnected society have brought about an unprecedented number of theological challenges in the context of the Christian church, which is faced with a multitude of modern heresies. Contemporary heresies result in a distortion of the biblical truths in line with the spirit of the age, which ends up affecting the faith of the individuals within the Body of Christ, and in this way it disrupts ecclesiastical unity. In this study, we will examine the character of contemporary heresies within the context of the Christian church, and the role that this institution bears in relation to them. On the basis of qualitative descriptive research method, and with the support of relevant literature, it is illustrated and verified that contemporary heresies—whether they be on the level of theological progressivism, or the reduction of the biblical faith to a materialistic level—are rapidly spread by digital media. In this context, the Christian church must acknowledge its role as a custodian of doctrine, and achieve the pedagogical and apologetic work necessary to preserve the purity of the faith, and in this way preserve the unity of the Body of Christ, in the presence of which is necessary in the context of plurality of religious realities.
explanation: The passage uses a highly formal, generic academic tone with broad claims and no specific data or citations, a pattern often seen in AI-generated text, though it could also come from a human-authored abstract; overall, AI authorship is plausible but not certain.
